## Summary of Work

### Problem
RO-Crate-Python was failing when loading JupyterLite test cases because `conformsTo` can be either:
- A single dict: `{"@id": "https://w3id.org/ro-crate/1.1/"}`
- An array: `[{"@id": "https://w3id.org/ro-crate/1.1/"}]`
